title: Is Influencer Klaudia Glam alive or dead? Gabrielle Carrington RIELLEUK custody news in London leaves fans searching for truth
summary_full: Klaudia Glam is not confirmed dead but is in critical condition after being hit by a car in London. Gabrielle Carrington, also known as RIELLEUK, has been arrested. The incident followed a street fight caught on video. Police have not confirmed rumors about the cause, and fans are still waiting for an official update on Klaudia’s health.
